title: CSIR NIO Notification 2026 - Apply for Senior Project Assistant Posts
description: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of various Senior Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates with M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR NIO Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking ...
